name: imprint
description: Paid, persistent semantic memory layer for AI agents — pay per store/recall via x402 on Casper.
comment_optional_embedders: For better semantic quality, optionally install ONE of: `npm i @huggingface/transformers` (offline MiniLM, set EMBEDDER=local), `npm i @google/genai` (set EMBEDDER=gemini + GEMINI_API_KEY), or `npm i openai` (set EMBEDDER=openai + OPENAI_API_KEY). The default EMBEDDER=mock needs no extra deps.
